subcodes.first_line: O ye who long for the countenance of that loving Beloved! Praise be to God, the city of Qazvin hath become such a banquet hall of the highest paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاقان روی آن دلبر مهربان الحمد لله مدینه قزوین چنین ضیافتگاه علیین گردید
subcodes.subjects: @importance of community building, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar
